name: milpa/data
description: Runtime-native persistence primitive for the Milpa PHP framework: a plain-entity + repository contract, with file-JSON, SQLite and MySQL document-store, and in-memory backends behind a common RepositoryInterface — zero ORM, zero migrations.

suggest.ext-pdo_sqlite: Required by SqliteRepository, the SQLite document-store backend — FileRepository and InMemoryRepository need no extension
suggest.ext-pdo_mysql: Required by MysqlRepository, the MySQL document-store backend (the production root) — FileRepository and InMemoryRepository need no extension
